description: §14.8.7 — a `<db>` state block with no `tables=` attribute fires E-PA-005. The analyzer must know which tables to bring into scope for the shadow DB + protect analysis; with none specified it fails closed.
source-test: compiler/src/protect-analyzer.ts (E-PA-005 fire site, step 3: tables= presence)
rationale: protect-analyzer §step3: a `<db>` block missing the required `tables=` attribute (or whose parsed list is empty) has no table set to scope, so protect-column resolution is impossible and E-PA-005 fires (skip-and-return).
